items.claim: Benoit Saint-Denis has a staph infection on his leg.
items.quote: there has been a few photos of Beni recently uh with some staff infection on his leg.

items.claim: Benoit Saint-Denis leaves his neck exposed for guillotines when shooting for takedowns.
items.quote: the way that Beno shoot steak downs, he sticks his neck out. So open for a guillotine.

items.claim: Benoit Saint-Denis absorbs too much damage in his fights.
items.quote: I know he gets hit way too much.

items.claim: Paddy Pimblett has significantly better takedown defense and get-up ability than Benoit Saint-Denis.
items.quote: I think Patty does have better takedown defense and get up game. Oh yeah, by a lot as well.

items.claim: Max Holloway's chin has become fragile following his fight with Ilia Topuria.
items.quote: I think that chin is probably a bit fragile now since Ilia was around in 2024.

items.claim: Conor McGregor has a significant power advantage over Max Holloway due to being a natural welterweight.
items.quote: I think he's got too much power. And we're talking about welterweight here. For me, the fact that we're at welterweight changes significantly how Max is going to perform.

items.claim: Max Holloway will be at a power disadvantage because he is not a natural welterweight and had to gain weight for the fight.
items.quote: Max is not a natural welterweight. He's had to gain weight for this fight. I don't see him having the same power as Connor just based on that.
